intro:
"Every single one of them is into you."
The choice is… yours.
description:
"Girls Who Are Totally Into Me" is a fresh take on the tap-style romance simulation game — where you picture each scenario from a description and let your imagination run wild.

One by one, a cast of unique and charming girls comes forward to share their feelings for you.
"What would it be like to date her?" Let your imagination wander as you make your choices.

Will you choose the one destined for you?
Or go for the ending where everyone loves you…?

"Wait, she's actually that type of girl?"
"They're all too charming — I just can't choose…!"

The thrill of romance meets the joy of imagination —
a simple yet irresistible harem experience that'll keep you coming back for more.

ーーーーーーーーーーーーーーー
MASK supports gaming content creators.
No permission from MASK is required to stream or create gameplay content, whether for personal or commercial use.
